name: Holy Angels School

campuses.name: Main Campus

intelligence.verdict: Parents say Holy Angels is a solid option for Catholic families in West Jakarta who want structured academics grounded in faith.

fees.note: Approximate annual fee range: US$3.1K – US$6.2K. Contact the school for the full fee schedule and payment options.

paragraphs: Diverse international and local student body. Contact the school for current enrolment details.
Facilities include: West Jakarta campus, Science laboratories, Libraries, Sports facilities, Chapel.
